commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8564e987df9f036a1c8b91f24942a5b1c9b3b9b0)
commands.review_summary:
This PR bumps the pinned `@openclaw/fs-safe` commit, exports `writeExternalFileWithinRoot` through OpenClaw security facades, and routes selected browser, media, channel, and QA external file outputs through staged finalization.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main writes `crabbox record` directly to `videoPath` and still checks that artifact after a recoverable nonzero exit, while the PR writes to a staged path that is cleaned up before final publication when the command throws.
commands.review_followup: A narrow repair can preserve Mantis recording artifacts on the known recoverable record-failure path without changing the broader staged-output refactor.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
